MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DISCOVERY MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 5, 2015 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY CALENDAR TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 23, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-05-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DISCOVERY MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO HAVE THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS OF $500 ARE AWARDED DEFENDANT AND SHALL BE PAID BY SEPTEMBER 1, 2015. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar; dismissal on file. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Discovery Motion Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Discovery Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions, the court denies defendant's request to have the Requests for Admission deemed admitted. Sanctions of $500 are awarded defendant and shall be paid by September 1, 2015. Prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order and comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Discovery Motion Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Discovery Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is continued to August 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302, Discovery Calendar to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 23, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported.
